result.summary: pubsublite.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud Pub/Sub Lite REST API and is also managed via gcloud Pub/Sub Lite commands; both use Google Cloud OAuth/Application Default Credentials.
result.description: Google Cloud Pub/Sub Lite is a partition-based messaging service for publishing and consuming large volumes of messages. It provides topic, subscription, reservation, cursor, and topic statistics management within Google Cloud.

gcp_oauth.label: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 access token / Application Default Credentials
gcp_oauth.setup: Use Google Cloud authentication as described in [Authenticate to Pub/Sub Lite](https://docs.cloud.google.com/pubsub/lite/docs/authentication). Easiest paths are to run `gcloud auth application-default login` for local development or attach a Google Cloud service account to your workload so Application Default Credentials can mint access tokens automatically. The REST API requires the `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform` scope.
